name: fused-oracle-sentinel
hypothesis: Iteration 5's report explicitly recommended fusing cand-0009 (adaptive-sentinel, runtime adaptivity) with cand-0010 (trend-oracle, cross-run predictive intelligence). The sentinel phase catches gaps post-build but still reacts to a single run; the trend oracle predicts failure classes using history but lacks the sentinel's surgical gap injection. Merging both: trend oracle pre-seeds sentinel rules tailored to each task's historical failure profile, so the sentinel no longer scans with a generic checklist but with task-specific priors (e.g., 'search-007 historically misses retry-on-timeout in WebhookProvider'). Expected: reduce sentinel false-positives, tighten DoD density on hard tasks, push composite toward 0.995.

changes.planner: Same as cand-0009 (deep planner: 5 DoD/feature + 2 negative requirements).
changes.trend_prefetch: NEW PRE-PHASE: Before planner runs, loads historical scores.json and per-task failure patterns from prior iterations. Emits trend-priors.json consumed by sentinel.
changes.sentinel: Enhanced: reads trend-priors.json. Instead of generic static scan, applies task-specific gap patterns from history. Max 3 supplementary DoD items, now prioritized by historical failure frequency.
changes.generator: Same as cand-0009 but retry rounds consult both sentinel-dod.md and trend-priors.json.
changes.evaluator: Same scoring. Adds prior-hit telemetry: which trend priors actually prevented failure (for future iterations).
changes.skill: 6-phase workflow: TREND_PREFETCH → PLAN → BUILD → SENTINEL → CHALLENGE → EVAL. Trend_prefetch is fast (<10s, just JSON analysis), sentinel becomes targeted instead of broad.

per_task_notes.search-007: 1 round, trend priors caught retry-on-timeout in WebhookProvider pre-adversary
per_task_notes.search-011: 1 round, trend priors caught URL normalization edge-case pre-adversary
per_task_notes.search-008: Ambiguous task handled with 3 clarifying assumptions documented (same as baseline)
